subcodes.first_line: O thou who art steadfast in the Covenant! Though tumult and clamor arose from this test and trial, yet through divine aid and grace [3.5s]
subcodes.first_line_orig: ای ثابت بر پیمان اگر چه همهمه و دمدمه ای از امتحان عیان شد ولی بعون و عنایت
subcodes.subjects: @petitions to authorities, @tests and trials; sacrifice and suffering, @pain of love; love as veil, @poems and quotation from poetry
